Li Ming
Go Backend Engineer

Summary
Built reliable distributed payment services using Go, PostgreSQL, Redis, and Kafka.

Experience
- Designed an idempotent payment event pipeline that reduced duplicate alerts by 80%.
- Improved API p95 latency from 420 ms to 160 ms through caching and query optimization.
- Led incident reviews and introduced SLO dashboards for critical services.

Education
Bachelor of Computer Science
